title: Find My Device -  Pin for headset location
scenario: Find My Device map merges multiple headset pins into a single counted pin when devices share the same location
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure GPS location permission is granted to the app.
Connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
Observe the map area on the Home screen for the connected headset's location pin.
Verify the connected headset shows a blue geo icon on the map.
Disconnect the headset from the mobile device.
Observe the map area again for the disconnected headset's location pin.
Verify the disconnected headset shows a gray geo icon on the map.
Connect two or more Poly headsets and place them at the same physical location.
Observe the map pins for the devices at the same location.
Verify that the individual pins merge into a single pin displaying a count number indicating the number of devices at that location.
expected: Connected headsets display a blue geo icon on the map. Disconnected headsets display a gray geo icon. When multiple devices are at the same location, their pins merge into one pin with a count number.
